ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the user (M/F) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the user rated the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie involved in the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., rating, review, watch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings received by the movie */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews written for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "recommended_movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended movie */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie watched */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date when the user watched the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_demographics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the user */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level achieved by the user */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
